analysis.event: Fall detected - person on floor motionless
analysis.action: Call emergency services immediately (911). Do not move the person unless in danger.
analysis.message: Individual appears to have fallen and is unresponsive. Immediate medical attention required.

recommended_response.first_aid: Check breathing and pulse. Do not move neck/spine.
recommended_response.follow_up: Stay with patient until help arrives

example_cases.input: Video frame showing person falling and lying still

output.message: Elderly person fell and is not moving

output.action: Check oxygen levels, position upright, call doctor
